description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly olive green and gray color scheme. The body is compact and angular, with a thick, cylindrical barrel and a large, rectangular magazine or battery compartment beneath the main frame. The grip is ergonomically shaped with textured grooves for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The upper receiver and barrel area are reinforced with ribbed and panel-like details, suggesting durability and advanced construction. The muzzle is capped with a vented, circular component, and the overall build appears to be a blend of metal and polymer materials, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, olive green and gray shotgun with a futuristic, angular design, ergonomic grip, and a vented barrel. Features a large under-barrel compartment and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ergonomic grip, large under-barrel compartment, and detailed upper receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular, vented muzzle and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main profile with visible grip texture and compartment details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel and upper receiver.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no finger grooves
